phosphates.description: The SOYUZSNAB Group of Companies offers **Denphos® melting salts** from Aditya Birla Chemicals, Thailand, for producers of processed cheeses. These are suitable for the production of pasty, block, sausage, and sliced processed cheeses, as the main principle of working with them is that there is no processed cheese without melting salts. Denphos® melting salts have the following competitive advantages: a correctly selected phosphate composition guarantees high quality of the finished product; they are a complete replacement for sanctioned Rovisal melting salts, which many Russian processed cheese manufacturers used; there is no need to prepare them in advance as a solution: Denphos® is added to the melting kettle at the beginning of cooking along with all ingredients; they are capable of working with complex raw materials to avoid the appearance of unmelted cheese particles; orthophosphates included in the salt composition give the product optimal density and elasticity. **Application areas:** Processed cheese, particularly pasty and sliced varieties, as well as imitation processed cheeses and mozzarella for pizza. They can also be used as a pH corrector for all types of processed cheeses. **Key advantages:** Stabilizes pH of cheese emulsion, can be combined with all types of Denphos complex food additives, ensures good shredding, even crust, and elastic threads when baking pizza cheese, possesses high emulsifying and stabilizing properties, and exhibits pronounced bacteriostatic properties.

{"name": "КОМПЛЕКСНАЯ ПИЩЕВАЯ ДОБАВКА 85 ДЕНФОСФАТ", "description": "Имеет высокий кремовый эффект и формирует гомогенную эмульсию с короткой однородной структурой. Обладает высокими эмульгирующими, стабилизирующими свойствами. Стабилизирует рН сырной эмульсии."}
